mapper.sql: pta.employee_id as pe_id, pta.begin_date, pta.end_date, pta.attendance_grade, pta.work_attitude_grade, pta.work_ifficiency_grade, pta.capacity_and_skill, pta.compliance_and_cooperation, pta.total_grade, pta.last_evaluate, pta.trail_result, pta.job_name, pta.category, pta.job_class, pta.lump_sum_wage, pta.base_salary, pta.performance_salary, pta.oa_order, pta.approval_date, pta.enabled_flag, pta.submit_flag, pta.approval_node, pta.approval_employee, pta.approval_result,pta.id, pta.create_time, pta.create_by, pta.update_time, pta.update_by,pta.sell_job,pta.approval_base_salary,pta.approval_performance_salary, pta.approval_lump_sum_wage,pta.admin_flag,pta.salary_proposal,pta.salary_change_range,pta.salary_idea, pta.current_node,pta.leader_by,pta.eligible_file,pta.file_degree,pta.last_file_time,pta.job_type,pta.entry_id

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.begin_date as ${tAlias}_begin_date, ${tAlias}.end_date as ${tAlias}_end_date, ${tAlias}.attendance_grade as ${tAlias}_attendance_grade, ${tAlias}.work_attitude_grade as ${tAlias}_work_attitude_grade, ${tAlias}.work_ifficiency_grade as ${tAlias}_work_ifficiency_grade, ${tAlias}.capacity_and_skill as ${tAlias}_capacity_and_skill, ${tAlias}.compliance_and_cooperation as ${tAlias}_compliance_and_cooperation, ${tAlias}.total_grade as ${tAlias}_total_grade, ${tAlias}.last_evaluate as ${tAlias}_last_evaluate, ${tAlias}.trail_result as ${tAlias}_trail_result, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.category as ${tAlias}_category, ${tAlias}.job_class as ${tAlias}_job_class, ${tAlias}.lump_sum_wage as ${tAlias}_lump_sum_wage, ${tAlias}.base_salary as ${tAlias}_base_salary, ${tAlias}.performance_salary as ${tAlias}_performance_salary, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.approval_date as ${tAlias}_approval_date, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.submit_flag as ${tAlias}_submit_flag, ${tAlias}.approval_node as ${tAlias}_approval_node, ${tAlias}.approval_employee as ${tAlias}_approval_employee, ${tAlias}.approval_result as ${tAlias}_approval_result, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.sell_job as ${tAlias}_sell_job, ${tAlias}.approval_base_salary as ${tAlias}_approval_base_salary, ${tAlias}.approval_performance_salary as ${tAlias}_approval_performance_salary, ${tAlias}.approval_lump_sum_wage as ${tAlias}_approval_lump_sum_wage, ${tAlias}.admin_flag as ${tAlias}_admin_flag,${tAlias}.salary_proposal as ${tAlias}_salary_proposal, ${tAlias}.salary_change_range as ${tAlias}_salary_change_range, ${tAlias}.salary_idea as ${tAlias}_salary_idea, ${tAlias}.current_node as ${tAlias}_current_node, ${tAlias}.leader_by as ${tAlias}_leader_by, ${tAlias}.eligible_file as ${tAlias}_eligible_file, ${tAlias}.file_degree as ${tAlias}_file_degree, ${tAlias}.last_file_time as ${tAlias}_last_file_time, ${tAlias}.job_type as ${tAlias}_job_type, ${tAlias}.entry_id as ${tAlias}_entry_id

select
,fdev.ext_dept_name AS pe_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS pe_department, fdev.ext_team_name AS pe_team,
,
,
,
from pm_trial_assess pta join pm_employee pe on pta.employee_id = pe.id left outer join pm_employee_job pe_pej on pe.id = pe_pej.employee_id and pe_pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe_pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pe_pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 left outer join fnd_job pe_pej_fj on pe_pej.job_id = pe_pej_fj.id and pe_pej_fj.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_pej_fj.deleted_flag = 1 left outer join pm_employee_entry pe_peen on pe.id = pe_peen.employee_id and pe_peen.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into pm_trial_assess (employee_id, begin_date, end_date, attendance_grade, work_attitude_grade, work_ifficiency_grade, capacity_and_skill, compliance_and_cooperation, total_grade, last_evaluate, trail_result, job_name, category, job_class, lump_sum_wage, base_salary, performance_salary, oa_order, approval_date, enabled_flag, submit_flag, approval_node, approval_employee,approval_result, sell_job,approval_base_salary,approval_performance_salary, approval_lump_sum_wage,admin_flag,salary_proposal,salary_change_range,salary_idea, current_node,leader_by,eligible_file,file_degree,last_file_time,job_type, entry_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{pmEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{attendanceGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workAttitudeGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workIfficiencyGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{capacityAndSkill,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{complianceAndCooperation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastEvaluate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trailResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{baseSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{performanceSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellJob,jdbcType=BIT}, #{approvalBaseSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{approvalPerformanceSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{approvalLumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{adminFlag,jdbcType=BIT},#{salaryProposal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{salaryChangeRange,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{salaryIdea,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currentNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{leaderBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{eligibleFile,jdbcType=BIT}, #{fileDegree,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{lastFileTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{jobType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_trial_assess set employee_id = #{pmEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, begin_date = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, attendance_grade = #{attendanceGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, work_attitude_grade = #{workAttitudeGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, work_ifficiency_grade = #{workIfficiencyGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, capacity_and_skill = #{capacityAndSkill,jdbcType=INTEGER}, compliance_and_cooperation = #{complianceAndCooperation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_grade = #{totalGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_evaluate = #{lastEvaluate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trail_result = #{trailResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category = #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_class = #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_date = #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, submit_flag = #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sell_job = #{sellJob,jdbcType=BIT}, approval_base_salary = #{approvalBaseSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, approval_performance_salary = #{approvalPerformanceSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, approval_lump_sum_wage = #{approvalLumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, admin_flag = #{adminFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, salary_proposal = #{salaryProposal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salary_change_range = #{salaryChangeRange,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, salary_idea = #{salaryIdea,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, current_node = #{currentNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leader_by = #{leaderBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, eligible_file = #{eligibleFile,jdbcType=BIT}, file_degree = #{fileDegree,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_file_time = #{lastFileTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, job_type = #{jobType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, entry_id = #{entryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update pm_trial_assess set
approval_base_salary = #{approvalBaseSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
approval_performance_salary = #{approvalPerformanceSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
approval_lump_sum_wage = #{approvalLumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update pm_trial_assess set current_node = #{currentNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eligible_file = #{eligibleFile,jdbcType=BIT}, file_degree = #{fileDegree,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_file_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
from pm_trial_assess pta where (pta.approval_result is null or pta.approval_result = 'pass') and pta.employee_id = #{employeeId}
